overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing a futuristic Asian-inspired urban environment. The character walks along elevated walkways and bridges, passing a mix of traditional red-lantern architecture and towering cyberpunk glass structures, before descending through a graffiti-covered stairwell to a lower commercial level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with traditional Asian architecture

events.description: character transitions from running to walking while passing a pedestrian

agents.ego_description: walking and running along the elevated walkway beside a red traditional building with hanging paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt walking in opposite direction, passed by ego
pedestrian with pink hair and brown coat walking ahead on the right

entered.detail: red painted building with wooden details and large windows running along the walkway
red cylindrical paper lanterns hanging from the building eaves
tall futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers with neon accents in the background
greenish paved tiles covering the walkway surface with white line markings
concrete and metal bench positioned against the left railing

segments.scene_description: The character moves along an elevated walkway sheltered by a traditional red building adorned with hanging paper lanterns. Sunlight streams in from the left, illuminating the green tiled floor. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and futuristic glass towers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge crossing over busy urban intersection

events.description: exits covered walkway onto open pedestrian bridge with view of street below
massive circular holographic billboard structure becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: crossing the pedestrian bridge while looking down at the street intersection below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking ahead toward the end of the bridge
construction worker in orange safety vest walking opposite direction

entered.detail: blue metal railings lining both sides of the pedestrian bridge
multi-lane street intersection with crosswalks visible below the bridge
massive circular floating structure with digital advertisements and smoke trails
teal-colored modern buildings with circular window patterns

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character crosses an elevated bridge over a city street. Blue railings line the walkway, and vehicles move along the road below. A massive circular holographic billboard dominates the skyline ahead, while teal modern buildings flank the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to futuristic tower complex with mixed traditional and cyberpunk architecture

events.description: approaching the cylindrical glass tower with reflective black surface
entering doorway into building interior, leaving outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: walking toward a cylindrical tower structure and entering a doorway at the end of the bridge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat entering the doorway ahead of ego

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with reflective black glass and red horizontal stripes
multi-tiered traditional Asian roof structure with red beams below the circular billboard
various neon advertisements and signage on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive cylindrical glass tower with reflective black surfaces. The circular holographic billboard looms overhead, supported by cables above a traditional pagoda-style structure. The character walks toward a doorway at the end of the bridge, transitioning from the open sky to an enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered stairwell leading to lower commercial courtyard

events.description: exiting stairwell into semi-covered courtyard with neon hotel signage
descending final flight of stairs toward street level

agents.ego_description: descending a narrow graffiti-covered stairwell and emerging into a lower courtyard with market stalls

notable_agents.action: person sitting against wall holding cardboard sign
pedestrian in dark clothing walking through the courtyard

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
blue neon sign reading HOTEL on the building facade
descending concrete stairway with debris scattered on steps
covered market stalls with green awnings in the lower courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stairwell with walls covered in graffiti, transitioning from bright sunlight to dim artificial lighting. Emerging into a lower courtyard, a neon blue HOTEL sign glows in the distance above market stalls. The character continues descending concrete stairs toward the bustling lower level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit, traditional elevated walkway into the dim, neon-lit depths of a lower urban level. It begins beneath a red building adorned with hanging paper lanterns, where sunlight illuminates green tiled floors and distant glass towers. As the character crosses an elevated bridge, the scene opens up to reveal blue railings, flowing traffic below, and a massive circular holographic billboard dominating the skyline. The camera then approaches a reflective black cylindrical tower and a pagoda-style structure before transitioning from the open sky into an enclosed doorway. Finally, the environment shifts from bright daylight to dim artificial light as the character descends a graffiti-covered stairwell toward a bustling lower courtyard marked by a glowing neon blue hotel sign.
